texto: Perhaps writing a story or a novel was not something that should be done for money, or to win praise, but for the sheer sensual pleasure of it. I liked that idea. It made me want to write lots of stories, to give myself that pleasure.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Vanessa Wu sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “Perhaps writing a story or a novel was not something that should be done for money, or to win pra…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, writing, pleasure, útil em momentos de reflexao.
